exports.content: The triple cation composition stabilizes the black perovskite phase at room temperature without requiring high-temperature annealing above 160C
exports.label: black_phase_stable

exports.content: Cs incorporation suppresses the formation of the non-perovskite delta-phase in FAPbI3-based compositions, producing monomorphic phase-pure perovskite films
exports.label: cesium_reduces_impurities

exports.content: Perovskite solar cells fabricated with triple cation Cs/(MA/FA) compositions in mesoporous TiO2 architecture, measured under standard AM1.5G illumination
exports.label: device_fabrication

exports.content: The improved reproducibility, stability, and reduced processing sensitivity of triple cation compositions are key properties for industrialization of perovskite photovoltaics
exports.label: key_for_industrialization

exports.content: Triple cation Cs-containing perovskite compositions are less sensitive to processing conditions than binary FA/MA compositions, enabling more reproducible device fabrication
exports.label: less_processing_sensitive

exports.content: Cs-containing perovskite films exhibit smoother, more uniform morphology with larger grain size compared to binary FA/MA films
exports.label: morphology_improved

exports.content: Triple cation devices maintain approximately 18% efficiency after 250 hours under operational conditions, demonstrating improved stability
exports.label: operational_18_pct_250h

exports.content: Triple cation devices show significantly improved batch-to-batch reproducibility compared to binary FA/MA compositions, with reduced standard deviation in PCE
exports.label: reproducibility_improved

exports.content: Triple cation perovskite solar cells achieve a stabilized power output of 21.1%, representing the highest stabilized efficiency at the time of publication
exports.label: stabilized_output_21_1_pct

exports.content: Adding inorganic cesium to FA/MA mixed perovskite compositions produces thermally more stable perovskites with fewer phase impurities
exports.label: triple_cation_stable
